data.body:
CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓

Production script changes (review-complexity-classifier.sh):
- Added source block for merge-state.sh with 3-path resolution (REPO_ROOT, SCRIPT_DIR, CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT)
- Replaced _is_merge_commit() body: delegates to ms_is_merge_in_progress() + ms_is_rebase_in_progress() when available; fallback to direct git-dir checks using _MERGE_STATE_GIT_DIR
- Removed MOCK_MERGE_HEAD, MOCK_REBASE_HEAD, and CLASSIFIER_GIT_DIR references from production code
